summary: Matrix blend of audience and soundboard captures a remarkable Black Peter jam.
review: The recording is praised for its consistent matrix mix of audience ambience and soundboard clarity, delivering a clean listening experience. Fans highlight the “remarkable jam at the end of Black Peter,” suggesting a strong musical moment despite limited commentary on the rest of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer rates the recording highly (4 stars) and notes good matrix quality, while another gives a zero‑star rating and only mentions a single jam highlight. The mixed feedback yields an average rating weighted toward show performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Consistent blend of audience ambience and soundboard (SBD) provides clear, balanced audio according to reviewer.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on overall set flow; only a specific jam at the end of Black Peter is highlighted.
